posts.author: KellyN (Kelly)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

We are photographers, and use the time tracking tool to track the length of time it takes for us to edit individual photoshoots before client delivery.

We have set a target of maximum 8 weeks per shoot.

Is there a way I can use a widget on our Dashboard that shows the overall average amount of time it takes us based on the year/number of shoots, and also a way that we can get a notification of shoots exceeding our 8 week target?

I have used a widget to show the time per shoot on the dashboard, and can see you can colour-code the times if they exceed a certain limit I set, however I can seem to see a way to cleanly show averages in the widget/dashboard. Any help is much appreciated!
